# Manage Project Documentation

Keep guides, reports, and reference docs in sync with code and requirements.

## Instructions

Follow the workflow in `.claude/skills/aida-docs.md`:

1. Identify the docs surface in scope (CLAUDE.md, OVERVIEW.md, docs/, READMEs)
2. Compare against current code/requirements for drift
3. Propose targeted updates with diffs; avoid wholesale rewrites
4. Save implementation plans to `docs/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md`
5. Cross-link docs to requirement spec IDs where relevant

Use when the user wants to refresh, audit, or add project documentation.
